description: Stress test: 20 small tasks creating sum utility functions to validate the Ralph loop speed and reliability

userStories.title: Sum of two integers
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum01.js exporting sum(a,b) that returns a+b. Create src/test-sums/sum01.test.js with 3 test cases.

userStories.title: Sum of array elements
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum02.js exporting sumArray(arr) that returns sum of all elements. Create test file with 3 cases.

userStories.title: Sum of even numbers in array
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum03.js exporting sumEvens(arr). Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of odd numbers in array
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum04.js exporting sumOdds(arr). Create test file.

userStories.title: Running sum of array
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum05.js exporting runningSum(arr) returning cumulative sum array. Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of digits of a number
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum06.js exporting sumDigits(n). Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of matrix (2D array)
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum07.js exporting sumMatrix(matrix). Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of first N natural numbers
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum08.js exporting sumNatural(n) using formula n*(n+1)/2. Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of squares
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum09.js exporting sumSquares(arr). Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of cubes
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum10.js exporting sumCubes(arr). Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum with initial value (reduce)
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum11.js exporting sumWithInit(arr, init). Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of absolute values
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum12.js exporting sumAbs(arr). Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of unique elements
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum13.js exporting sumUnique(arr). Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of fibonacci up to N
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum14.js exporting sumFib(n) — sum of fib numbers <= n. Create test file.

userStories.title: Pair sum — find pairs that sum to target
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum15.js exporting pairSum(arr, target) returning count of pairs. Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of string digit characters
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum16.js exporting sumStringDigits(str). Create test file.

userStories.title: Nested array deep sum
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum17.js exporting deepSum(arr) that handles nested arrays. Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum of object values
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum18.js exporting sumValues(obj). Create test file.

userStories.title: Weighted sum
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/sum19.js exporting weightedSum(values, weights). Create test file.

userStories.title: Sum index file
userStories.description: Create src/test-sums/index.js that re-exports all 19 sum functions. Create src/test-sums/index.test.js that imports from index and verifies all exist.
acceptanceCriteria: index.test.js verifies each export is a function
All 19 functions are accessible via import from index
